title: Threads is getting new parental control features - Engadget
summary: Parental Supervision gives insights into time a teen spends in the app, as well as controls for setting time limits and sleep mode hours. The Parental Supervision tools are meant to complement other built-in restrictions for all teen accounts on Threads.
